title: zornia pratensis var. glabrior
intro: Zornia pratensis var. glabrior, also known as Glabrous Buttonweed, is a perennial herb in the family Fabaceae, native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Glabrous Buttonweed is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be taken internally to alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues and other health concerns.
